why_now: the reviewed candidate already has an owner-local landing and the owner repo is explicit, so the next honest move is a direct bounded owner update rather than another provisional hop
why_not_nearest_wrong_target: the candidate is a bounded skill-layer unit, not recurring scenario method for aoa-playbooks
stats_refresh_hint: refresh after the reviewed owner landing either stabilizes or changes terminal posture
stop_conditions: stop if the owner repo changes from aoa-skills
stop if proof becomes a prerequisite before the owner-local change can stay bounded
